title: The Legal Representatives Suits Act, 1855
full_text: The Legal Representatives Suits Act, 1855 विधिक प्रतिनिधिवाद अधिनियम,1855 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 185512 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1855-03-27 Act Year: 1855 Short Title: The Legal Representatives Suits Act, 1855 Hindi Title: विधिक प्रतिनिधिवाद अधिनियम,1855 Long Title: An Act to enable Executors, Administrators or Representatives to sue and be sued for certain wrongs. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 27-03-1855 Last Updated: 25-03-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Legal Representatives Suits Act, 1855 Show all section Section 1. Executors may sue and be sued in certain cases for wrongs committed in lifetime of deceased. Section 2. Death of either party not to abate suit. Proviso.
